CMR_OFFERED_DT 
LABEL: 
Date Comprehensive Medication Review (CMR) offered 
DESCRIPTION: This variable is the date of the initial comprehensive medication review (CMR) within the reporting 
period.

DATE 
LENGTH: 
9 
SOURCE: 
CMS (HPMS files)

CMS created the MTM file from information submitted by Part D plan sponsors to
